data.description: SalMar ASA recently distributed a cash dividend, with important details available to shareholders.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops As Trump's War Comments Hit Stocks; Oil Surges (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following President Trump's warning to Iran to expedite negotiations for a peace agreement. Concurrently, oil prices saw a significant increase. The stock market today witnessed a drop, with the Dow Jones being notably impacted by Trump's remarks on potential conflict, and oil prices surged. This live coverage on the current stock market activities highlights the repercussions of Trump's statements on Iran, with the Dow experiencing a downturn and oil prices rising rapidly.

data.title: The Gates by City Ventures Opens This Weekend in Morgan Hill
data.description: In Morgan Hill, California, City Ventures, a top builder of solar-powered homes, has revealed the Grand Opening of The Gates scheduled for this Saturday, March 28. This new community provides a blend of sustainable and affordable housing options in a vibrant, mixed-use environment within Santa Clara County. The project offers a rare opportunity for buyers to invest in eco-friendly homes in a sought-after location. This initiative aims to cater to the growing demand for environmentally conscious living in the region.

data.title: Retail investors show increasing interest in Bitcoin giant Strategy's STRC over MSTR, says CEO Phong Le.
data.description: The CEO of Strategy, Phong Le, indicated that there is a rising interest among retail investors in the company's leading preferred share in comparison to its common stock.

data.title: Bluesky is a decentralized social media platform challenging Elon Musk's X. AT protocol can be a game-changer.
data.description: Bluesky, although seemingly ordinary at first glance, operates on the AT protocol architecture, promising groundbreaking advancements.

data.title: Oscars relocating outside Hollywood in 2029 to downtown LA, under a new deal with AEG, a major entertainment venue developer.
data.description: Starting in 2029, an event will take place in downtown Los Angeles as per an agreement reached between the academy and AEG, an entertainment venue developer.

data.title: Pivot Bio Announces Strategic Partnership with Red Reef Partners to Accelerate Nitrogen Optimization on North American Farmland
data.description: Pivot Bio, a prominent agtech company specializing in patented crop nutrition technologies, has revealed a significant collaboration with Red Reef Partners, a sustainable farmland investment firm based in Boca Raton, Florida. This strategic alliance aims to integrate Pivot Bio’s nitrogen solutions, manufactured in the U.S., into Red Reef’s farmland holdings across North America. The partnership underscores a mutual commitment to promoting resilient and environmentally conscious agricultural practices.

data.title: Taste of Iceland Festival Returns to D.C. April 23-25
data.description: A specially selected array of music, cuisine, and cultural activities showcasing Iceland's finest will be featured in Washington. Taste of Iceland 2026, presented by Inspired by Iceland, will be held in Washington, D.C. from April 23 to April 25. This event will offer attendees a unique opportunity to experience the best of Icelandic culture, including musical performances, delicious cuisine, and various cultural events.

data.title: Critical Path Institute Launches 'One to Millions' to Reshape the Future of Individualized Medicine at Global Scale
data.description: A worldwide effort has been initiated to expand the availability of cutting-edge medical treatments and speed up patient access on a global scale. On March 26, 2026, the Critical Path Institute® (C-Path) disclosed the introduction of the One to Millions program in Tucson, Arizona, and Amsterdam. This initiative aims to involve a diverse group of stakeholders from both public and private sectors to facilitate widespread access to advanced therapeutics.

data.title: Oscars to relocate outside Hollywood, shifting to downtown LA in 2029 as per contract between Academy and AEG.
data.description: Commencing in 2029, a significant event will take place in the heart of Los Angeles as per an agreement struck between the Academy and AEG, a prominent entertainment venue developer.

data.title: Patterson Announces Chief Digital Officer
data.description: Patterson Companies, headquartered in St. Paul, Minnesota, has recently named Gregg Kunes as their new Chief Digital Officer. With a strong background in enhancing growth and innovation in worldwide distribution and manufacturing sectors, Kunes will be overseeing the digital strategies for the company. Reporting directly to CEO Robert Rajalingam, Kunes, who possesses more than two decades of experience, was previously in charge of global digital operations. This move underscores Patterson's commitment to advancing its digital presence under Kunes' leadership.
